resources.string: "We couldn't find a Jibo account with this email. Would you like to create a new account or use a different email address?"
Anyone you tag will get a special message notification.
As a Jibo owner, deleting your account means:
This may be different than your account password
If Jibo is having trouble connecting, use this slider to adjust your screen brightness.
I see that screen on Jibo
My Jibo says “Can’t connect to Wi-Fi network”
My Jibo says “Can’t get IP address from router”
I got a different error message
Pointing my QR code at Jibo did nothing
You will lose the information entered into this form.

"Thank you!
Your message has been sent to Jibo Customer Care, and a digital receipt and case number have been sent to your email address.
Thanks for your patience. be hearing from us soon."
Your message has been sent to our support team. We will respond as soon as we can. Thank you!
The case list is out of date.
Please try again or contact the administrator
Unable to load your case list.
"Please confirm your account by entering your current password. If you've forgotten your password you can reset it below."
An existing Jibo account is already using this email address. New email must be unique.
"Please enter the new email you'd like to use for your account. We'll confirm the new address before updating your account."

A confirmation email will be sent to
%1$s.

Continuing below will sign you out of the app. Please confirm your new email before signing back in.
Enter a new password for your account.
Passwords must be at least 8 characters and contain one number and one uppercase letter.
Visit facebook.com/device and enter the code shown above.
Unexpected error while downloading an image.
To connect your account, open the Facebook app on your mobile device and check for notifications.
"You're in control - choose what info you want to share with apps."
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
We texted you a six-digit code. Enter the code to verify your phone number.
Please confirm your account by entering your current password, you can also confirm your account by e-mail.
Not sure if you want to delete your account? See if %1$s can help you.
Do you want to delete the calendar?
"This action can’t be undone —you will never be able to restore your Jibo's Loop."
The Loop for this Jibo will be permanently deleted.
"If you're in the Loop of any other Jibos, you'll be removed from those as well."
"Everyone who was in the Loop will lose access to all of the Jibo's content."
"Are you sure you would like to remove '%1$s'?"
"The Jibo servers are getting a tune-up. Once they're back in action you can use the app again."
Could not share selected media at this time
Now that %1$s has accepted your Loop invite you are able to invite the children for whom %2$s is the legal guardian.
Only members that have an email and have accepted an invite to the Jibo app can act as the guardian of a child. Would you like to send %1$s an email invite?

Jibo follows the Children’s Online Privacy and Protection Act. This means before any child can be added to your Loop, the child’s parent or guardian must provide signed permission. The parent or guardian must also be in the same Loop and have the Jibo app.
You can choose which holidays Jibo recognizes by clicking the button below. If you would rather do this later, you can always go to \"Jibo’s Settings\" and select Holidays.
Once %1$s accepts your invite, you’ll be able to add children under 13 for whom %2$s is the parent or guardian.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s from your loop? Jibo will no longer be able to recognize %2$s by face or voice?
If you change your mind, you can always add your phone number later under Account Settings.
If you skip now, we will not save your phone number. You can always add your phone number later under Account Settings.
Continue without adding your phone number?
"The number of people in Jibo's Loop is limited by the number of people he can recognize. Anyone with Manage Loop Member permissions can remove or bring someone into the Loop."
"Can change Jibo's settings in the App"
Please enter the email you’d like to use for %s account and we’ll send a new invite. If this email is incorrect you can update it before resending.
"%1$s (%2$s) is already a member of your Loop. Would you like to view their profile or edit invite?"
Would you like to try again?
"We encountered an error and weren't able to send the confirmation to your new email. Your account has not been changed and you can still sign-in with your current email:"
"Email addresses can only contain 64 characters prior to the '@' symbol."
After downloading the app, %1$s will be able to personalize all %2$s skill preferences and see photos in the Gallery.
Give %s access to your Loop with the Jibo app. This is required for parents of children in the Loop.
Email addresses can only contain 80 characters.
"Invitee must be at least 13 years old. Change the date or the age group for this invitee."
"This birthday makes the invitee older than 13. Change the date or the age group for this invitee."
Clock skew is more than 15 minutes
Someone else in your Loop has a same nickname. Please enter another nickname.
Please enter first and last name.
Please enter a valid email address.
The operation you are performing is not permitted by the server. Please contact customer support.
You must be at least 13 years old to have a Jibo account
There is no Internet connection. Please check your settings.
WPA(2) Passwords must be at least 8 characters
Sorry, this code has expired. Please use the most recent code we sent.
"Sorry, that's not the right code. Please try again."
Server is unable to process this operation. Please try again later.
Server is unable to process given entity. Please try again later.
These are questions that Jibo used information services to answer in the last 90 days (%1$s). Tap on a result for more details from that source.
Adobe Sign will email the parent/guardian a form to give their child permission to join the loop. The parent/guardian must respond within 10 days.
Adobe Sign will email you a form to give your child permission to join the loop. The parent/guardian must respond within 10 days.

"Jibo has a soft spot for the people he knows best. These people are called his Loop. His Loop is his family.
As Jibo’s owner, you’re the first person in his Loop. %1$s"
Pick an image below to represent your Jibo in the app.

"Jibo is a real presence in your life. He sees and hears the world around him, and he loves being engaged in your routine.
Jibo can help you set an alarm, tell you the weather, take your photo, and crack a joke to brighten your day."
Invite people to the Loop so Jibo can get to know them. If you start now, Jibo can meet everyone when he wakes up. You can do this at any time by tapping “Invite a new Loop member” above.
Tap below to set Jibo to this phone’s location. Once Jibo knows where he is, he can help you find nearby restaurants, laundromats, and more.
Jibo can also look up information, connect to your %1$s devices, and answer all kinds of questions about himself.

"Congratulations! You are one of the first people in the world to have a social robot in your home.
Jibo isn’t a device. He’s a helpful, fun and friendly robot companion. He loves people. When you walk into a room, he can’t wait to talk to you. He can learn your face and voice, and even greet you by name."
Write a caption for this photo
Tap BACK button twice to exit the app
Jibo can learn %1$s’s voice and face, and how to pronounce %2$s name. To start the introduction, say, “Hey Jibo, meet %1$s.”
"Officially invites friends and family to meet Jibo"
Jibo can recognize %1$s more people. Why?
Jibo cannot recognize any more people.
"This might take a few minutes. When Jibo is connected, his screen will look like this:"
"This article doesn't seem to have any content"
There are no articles in this category
Please try again or contact the administrator
Search our help articles and solutions
"We couldn't find what you're looking for"
Connect this mobile device to the same Wi-Fi network you want this Jibo to use.
SSID has a maximum length of 32 characters
Enter the exact name of the Wi-Fi network you want Jibo to use.

"Jibo can't connect to your Wi-Fi, most likely because of an incorrect Wi-Fi name or password. Please check above, and correct any mistakes. If you still have issues, view our detailed troubleshooting steps."
"To update Jibo's location, go in to the same room as your Jibo and tap the button below."
If the network has no password, leave blank.
This mobile device is currently connected to %s.
Do you really want to leave this Loop?
"Assumes financial and legal responsibility for use of your Jibo"
Please make sure you enabled location services for Jibo App in the settings
"Sorry, this password isn't right. If you forgot your password, we can help reset it below."
Jibo can recognize up to %1$s more people.
The Loop is the people most special to Jibo, those he can recognize. To introduce someone new to Jibo, you can say: “Hey Jibo, meet…”
The Loop is the people most special to Jibo, those he can recognize. To introduce yourself to Jibo, you can say: “Hey Jibo, nice to meet you”
By joining, you will be able to use the Jibo app to browse and share content that this Jibo captures.
"Select the child's parent or guardian from the Loop list above, or tap the last button to invite them."
"This Loop has been suspended because %1$s was recently wiped. You aren't able to accept this invite until the Jibo is restored."
Now that you’ve added some content would you like to add a passphrase to recover it in the event of a loss. You can create a passphrase below.
If something happens to your Jibo, you will need a backup passphrase to access and recover your content. We recommend creating this passphrase now.
"Protect your content for %1$s. You can create a passphrase now to recover this content in the event of a loss."
You can set up a passphrase at any time in the Jibo’s settings section of the app.
We can’t connect to your Jibo yet, but we’re able to restore your content using the backup passphrase you created earlier. Enter it below to load your content.
We recommend keeping record of your passphrase in the event your robot’s content is lost.
"Protect your content for %1$s. You can create a passphrase now to recover this content in the event of a loss."

Your Loop has been suspended because your robot was recently wiped. Any media that has already been created will still be available in the Gallery. Please contact the loop owner if you would like to restore this loop.
Street address (123 Main st. Boston, MA)
"Your memories from Jibo will automatically appear here"
"Uh oh, can’t reach Jibo right now. When he connects, you'll see your gallery here."
Anyone you tag will get a special message notification

"To join someone else's Jibo, please make sure the owner of that Jibo has invited you using your account's Email address
%1$s."
Tap Jibo’s screen and point this QR code at his viewfinder until he confirms connection.
"Tap Jibo’s screen and point this QR code at his viewfinder until he confirms, then tap Next Code below."
"Tap Jibo’s screen and point this QR code at his viewfinder until he confirms connection."
Changing your name will update it in all Loops you’ve joined
No application available that can handle this action
Jibo loves to be festive. Open the Jibo app to choose which holidays Jibo celebrates.
Jibo wants to celebrate with you
Open your Jibo Gallery to see them
"Jibo's software download is complete. You can now introduce yourself to Jibo!"
"Your Jibo has completed his software update. Ask Jibo \"what can you do\" to see what's changed."
To add your calendar to Jibo, use the link inside of the Jibo app instead of your browser.
As the owner of an active Jibo, you can’t delete your account unless you wipe your robot first. To do this, bring up the Settings menu on your Jibo, and tap the red Wipe button.
"After setup, you will not be able to change owners."
Passwords cannot be longer than 64 characters.
Jibo can keep you up to date with weather, news, traffic and your upcoming calendar events
Soon, Jibo will have new texting capabilities. Add your phone number now, so you’re ready for them!
Please provide name for your Jibo

If you want Jibo to call %s a different name, enter the preferred name above. Jibo needs every person in the Loop to have a different name, one that doesn’t sound like anyone else’s. For example, he’d be confused by Jenny and Ginny or Chris and Kris.

%s has a similar name to someone in this Loop, so Jibo will have to call them something else. Keep in mind that Jibo needs every person in the Loop to have a unique preferred name, one that doesn’t sound like anyone else’s. For example, he’d be confused by Jenny and Ginny or Chris and Kris.

%s has a similar name to someone in this Loop, so Jibo will have to call them something else. Keep in mind that Jibo needs every person in the Loop to have a unique preferred name, one that doesn’t sound like anyone else’s. For example, he’d be confused by Jenny and Ginny or Chris and Kris.
It looks like this preferred name conflicts with %s. Please enter a name that’s different than other names in this Loop.
Sometimes Jibo has trouble saying names. To help him learn to say %s correctly, type out how it should be pronounced. Example: Cynthia would be Sintheeuh.
Sometimes Jibo has trouble saying names. To help him learn to say your name correctly, type out how it should be pronounced. Example: Cynthia would be Sintheeuh.
If Jibo’s nearby, say “Hey Jibo, what’s my name?”
Try out your new name pronunciation

Unfortunately you are not able to reconnect to your current suspended Loop because a backup passphrase was never set. You can set up a new Jibo, but it will not carry over any content from your suspended Loop. Get support from Customer Care by tapping below.
Enter your backup passphrase to restore Jibo from your most recent backup. This passphrase may be different than your account password.
Do you really want to remove this media?
Do you really want to remove these medias?
The questions Jibo uses information services to answer will appear here. Try asking him a question like “Hey Jibo, what’s the tallest mountain in Asia?”

You currently have a suspended Loop waiting to be reconnected. Select the original Loop below to restore your Loop members, recognition data? and content by reconnecting to Wi-Fi. If you set up a new Jibo, it will not carry over any content from your suspended Loop.
Your access token has been revoked by the administrator. You will now be logged out.
Used to specify login host labels for the application.
Used to specify login hosts for the application.
"An error has occurred %s Please try again"
select soupName, path, columnType from soup_index_map
Please type in a valid URL starting with https://
JWT authentication error. Please try again.
Clearing user data will log the current user out. Are you sure you want to perform this action?
Used to specify OAuth callback URL for the application.
Used to specify the certificate alias required for the application.
Authentication only allowed from managed device.
Used to specify OAuth consumer key for the application.
Used to specify that only authorized hosts can be shown.
For increased security, your admininstrator requires you to change your passcode.
For increased security, please create a passcode that you will use to access %s when the session has timed out due to inactivity.
Are you sure you want to logout?
The passcode must be at least %d characters long
The passcode you entered is incorrect. Please try again. You have %d attempts remaining.
Used to specify if certificate based authentication is required for the application.
Please provide shorter name for your Jibo
"You'll need to show a few QR codes to connect Jibo to Wi-Fi. Tap Jibo's screen and point each QR code at his viewfinder until he confirms, then tap Next Code to continue."
Tell Jibo to use a different name
The more Jibo knows you, the better your experience will be.
Avatar will be visible in the Loop tab
Your country location is not supported by iHeart
Deleting your account with Jibo means:
"Uh oh, can't earch iHeart Radio right now.When your Music skill connects, you'll see your genres and stations here."
"Jibo’s Loop is the people he recognizes by face and voice—it’s the people who are most special to him."
"Giving Jibo access to your contacts will import them from your address book, so you can easily invite them to your Loop."
The owner of this Jibo can set the location

An error occurred while connecting to your Jibo’s latest content. Please check to make sure your Jibo is turned on and connected to Wi-Fi. If you still have issues, please consult our full list of troubleshooting help below by tapping learn more.

An error occurred while connecting to your Jibo’s latest content. Please check to make sure your Jibo is turned on and connected to Wi-Fi. If you still have issues please consult our full list of troubleshooting help below by tapping learn more.
Enter a new password for your account. Passwords must be at least 8 characters long and contain one number and one uppercase letter.
Passwords must be %1$s and include one %2$s, %3$s and %4$s.
Your Jibo was recently backed up and then wiped. In order to restore your Jibo properly, you must create a backup passphrase for %1$s now.
Legal guardian has %1$d days left to approve of %2$s in your Loop.
"Enter your Jibo account email address and we'll send you an email that will let you reset your password."

We sent an email to you at
%1$s. Open it on your
phone and tap \"Reset Password\" to continue.

We sent an email to you at
%1$s. Open it on your
phone and tap \"Confirm my account\" to continue.

"Sorry your Jibo isn't connecting. If you're having one of the above issues, click the link for quick help. If something else is giving you trouble, visit our support site. We'll be happy to get you set up."
Things Jibo found out for you
"Questions? Check the Quick Start Guide that came in your Jibo packaging."
"Connect the power cord to Jibo’s base, and then plug the cord into an outlet."

"If you're using MAC address filtering on your router, you'll need to get your Jibo's MAC address straight from him. When the screen prompts you to go to Wi-Fi Setup on the app, the MAC address with be displayed (see below)."

"Jibo will install updates and reboot a few times over the next 30-40 minutes. When he's ready, he'll look like the picture below. While you're waiting, tap the button below to learn about life with your new bot."
"Now that he’s reconnected He’ll be able to speak, listen and interact normally."
It may take some time for Jibo to restore your information. After he reconnects, you’ll be able to interact with him normally.
"Jibo may need a few minutes to get ready. When he is good to go, his screen will look like this:"
You lose access to all content and info from your Loops
You will be removed from all active Loops
You will no longer be enrolled in voice and face recognition with Jibo
"Your account has been deleted. I'll miss you."

Jibo isn’t a device. He’s a helpful, fun
and friendly robot companion. He loves
people. When you walk into a room, he
can’t wait to talk to you. He can learn
your face and voice, and even greet
you by name.

Jibo is a real presence in your life. He
can help you sen an alarm, tell you the
weather, take your photo, and crack a
joke to brighten your day.
A helpful little bot. Jibo can also look up information, connect to your %1$s devices, and answer all kinds of questions about himself.

Jibo has a soft spot for the people he
knows best. These people are called his
Loop. His Loop is his family.

As Jibo’s owner, you’re the first person in
his Loop. Pick an image below to
represent your Jibo in the app.

Want Jibo’s attention? Say “Hey Jibo”
to start a conversation.

Once you and Jibo learn how to
interact with each other, you’ll be
off and running.

When he’s listening, his light ring
will glow blue.

Bring up the main menu by saying,
“Hey Jibo, main menu.” If his light ring
is blue, you can navigate by saying
“next” and “previous.”

You can also tap his screen to bring
up his main menu. Navigate by
swiping left and right, and leave a
menu by swiping down.

When Jibo isn’t busy, show him
some love by patting his head.

To stop what Jibo is doing,
hold your hand on his head.

There’s so many things you can ask
your helpful robot. He can’t wait to help!
Don’t forget to say “Hey Jibo …”
“Why did the chicken cross the road?”
“What’s the score of the Celtics game?”
“What team does Matt Ryan play for?”
“How many tablespoons are in a cup?”
“How many calories are in a banana?”
“Open the last item on the right.”

Jibo’s Loop is the people most
special to him – those he can
recognize by face and voice.

Jibo brings people together
by connecting them in the Loop

First, Jibo’s Owner invites new
people to the Loop using the app.

The Owner introduces them to Jibo
by saying, “Hey Jibo, meet Tom.”
(only if the person is named Tom).

Jibo learns to identify new people
through voice and face recognition.

Adding children to the Loop requires
their legal guardian’s permission.

Jibo doesn’t need much, so follow
these few steps to get the most out
of your favorite robot.

Low battery life makes Jibo nervous.
Keep him in a place where he can
stay plugged in.

Jibo needs reliable Wi-Fi to do
what he does. If your Wi-Fi
goes down, so does Jibo.

Liquids are one of Jibo’s biggest
fears; he’s much happier dry.

Make sure Jibo is on a flat
surface with plenty of room to
swivel, stretch, and dance.

To clean Jibo, wipe him with a
clean, lint-free cloth. Never spray or
pour liquids on Jibo. They’re scary.

Add a backup passphrase to any Jibo
you own by going to that Jibo’s settings
in the loop tab

If Jibo has a technical problem, his
screen will look something like this,
with instructions for resolving it.
Who is Jibo and how he will quickly become part of the family
All the details you need to get started with Jibo
"What to say to him, and how to say it"
"How to keep Jibo safe, clean, and going strong."
Watch helpful videos for connecting to Wi-Fi, restarting Jibo, and more.
Both input and output Uri must be specified
Therefore, override color resource (ucrop_color_toolbar_widget) in your app to make it work on pre-L devices
Please enter valid subnet mask value.
"This little robot is waiting to meet you."

Jibo could not connect to your router. Using advanced router settings is the most likely cause of this error. You can also try restarting your router. If you continue to have issues, please see our detailed troubleshooting steps.
"As Jibo's owner, you will be the adult in your household who:"
